title: Nordby Bakker & Issehoved
description:
Route A (18km loop): Nordby → Nordby Church → Møgelskår → west coast cliffs → Ballebjerg (64m lookout) → Pelkeshøj → Issehoved (northernmost tip) → east coast beach → Nordby.
Route B (11km loop): Ballebjerg → Issehoved → east coast beach → Nordby.

title: Island Cycling Routes
description:
Sælvig → Havvejen north → Langør (Stavns Fjord views, birdlife) → Nordby Hede heath → Onsbjerg → Tranebjerg → Ballen harbour.
Stops: farm stalls for asparagus, Samsø Madsnedkeri, Røgeriet smoked fish at Ballen.
E-bikes from Ø-Hjul or Samsø Cykler at Sælvig harbour.

title: Gastronomy
description: Nordby Kro, Nordby 13, Røgeriet smoked fish, Samsø Madsnedkeri, Restaurant Dokken. May = peak asparagus, early strawberries, rhubarb.

title: Sams Island Distillery
description: Gin, rum, vodka and local snaps in Brundby. Founded 2017. Optional detour (~DKK 100–150/person for a tasting).

title: Seal Safari & Stavns Fjord
description: Old wooden boat M/S Tunø from Langør. Stavns Fjord birdlife lagoon and the Energy Academy in Tranebjerg (~DKK 150–200).

title: Samsø Labyrint
description: World's largest permanent tree labyrinth — 60,000 m² with 5,380m of paths. Planted in willow, oak and apple. Near Nordby at M.B.Jensensvej 12. Open May–September.
